caption: A man wearing a maroon long-sleeved shirt and glasses speaks into a microphone, gesturing with his left hand. To his right, another man stands wearing a white traditional outfit with a yellow and green sash draped over his shoulder. To the left of the man in maroon, a third man sits wearing a white short-sleeved shirt. They are positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring green accents and orange circular graphics. Legible text on the background includes ".2021" and phrases in a non-Latin script, including "லந்துதுறையாடல்". As the sequence progresses, the man in the maroon shirt continues to speak and gesture, while the man in white remains standing nearby. The camera remains mostly static, capturing the interactions and the positioning of the three men against the branded backdrop.
